name: Apple Wheat Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Apple, Tart, Chopped and Peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to the bread machine in the order specified by the manufacturer's instructions.
2. Start the machine and let it complete the baking cycle as per the recipe from "The Ultimate Bread Machine Cookbook" by Lacalamita.
3. Yield: 1 loaf. Posted on NVN #134205 by Laguda on 06/12/94, MM format.
